task_completion.description: Verify that the four required bookmark folders have been created on the Bookmark Bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Bookmark Bar (below the address bar). You should see folders named exactly 'County Assessors', 'MLS & Listings', 'Zoning & GIS', and 'Title & Deeds'.

task_completion.description: Verify that personal and shopping bookmarks have been removed from the Bookmark Bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Bookmark Bar. There should be no visible bookmarks for personal/shopping sites (e.g., Amazon, Netflix, Facebook, Spotify, Walmart). Only the professional folders or real estate sites should remain.

task_completion.description: Verify that browser history was selectively cleared for personal domains while preserving professional real estate domains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the Chrome History page (chrome://history). Evidence of selective clearing includes searching for personal domains (e.g., 'amazon', 'netflix') yielding no results, while professional domains (e.g., 'zillow', 'lacounty.gov') are still visible in the history list.

task_completion.description: Verify that custom site search shortcuts for Zillow and Redfin have been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Settings 'Manage search engines and site search' page. Under 'Site search', verify there are entries for Zillow (Shortcut: 'zil', URL: 'https://www.zillow.com/homes/%s_rb/') and Redfin (Shortcut: 'red', URL: 'https://www.redfin.com/city/%s').

task_completion.description: Verify that the default download location is set to the Property_Appraisals folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Settings 'Downloads' page. The 'Location' field should display the path ending in '/home/ga/Documents/Property_Appraisals'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the browser is configured to ask where to save each file before downloading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Settings 'Downloads' page. The toggle switch for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' must be turned ON (usually indicated by a blue toggle).

task_completion.description: Verify that PDF documents are set to download instead of opening in the browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Settings 'PDF documents' page (under Site Settings > Additional content settings). The radio button for 'Download PDFs' must be selected instead of 'Open PDFs in Chrome'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent clicking through Chrome menus, settings pages, and the bookmark manager, rather than using a terminal to modify SQLite databases or JSON files directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the settings modified are within the actual Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the address bar in the screenshots. It should show valid internal Chrome URLs like 'chrome://settings/...', 'chrome://bookmarks/', or 'chrome://history/'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show the execution of Python, bash, or sqlite3 commands aimed at directly altering Chrome's 'Preferences', 'Bookmarks', 'History', or 'Cookies' files in the user data directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Bookmark Folders: 'County Assessors', 'MLS & Listings', 'Zoning & GIS', 'Title & Deeds'. Professional domains to keep: lacounty.gov, sdttc.com, sccassessor.org, ocgov.com, smcacre.org, zillow.com, realtor.com, redfin.com, loopnet.com, crexi.com, nationalmap.gov, fema.gov, earth.google.com, historicaerials.com, arcgis.com, firstam.com, fidelity.com, stewart.com, oldrepublictitle.com, netronline.com. Personal domains to remove/clear: amazon.com, wayfair.com, overstock.com, netflix.com, hulu.com, spotify.com, facebook.com, twitter.com, instagram.com, macys.com, nordstrom.com, etsy.com, target.com, walmart.com, bestbuy.com. Search Engines: Zillow (keyword: 'zil', URL: 'https://www.zillow.com/homes/%s_rb/'), Redfin (keyword: 'red', URL: 'https://www.redfin.com/city/%s'). Download Directory: '/home/ga/Documents/Property_Appraisals'.
